title: cracca major
intro: Cracca major, also known as Lupinus angustifolius, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Africa. This legume plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Cracca major include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Cracca major include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, often used to treat various health conditions.
